purpose: Public-safe schema for a small routing-and-decision gold probe that separates registered-template tool calls from adapter-needed and out-of-scope text.

fields.name: gold_id
fields.description: Stable identifier for the gold-probe row.

fields.name: source_family
fields.description: Scenario family or external literature family that motivates the row.

fields.name: source_reference
fields.description: Public-safe local anchor or external source URL.

fields.name: route_label
fields.description: Gold routing label before claim-intake decision.

fields.name: template_id
fields.description: Registered template id when route_label is CALL_REGISTERED_TEMPLATE.

fields.name: submitted_claim
fields.description: Claim or text fragment to route or audit.

fields.name: intended_use
fields.description: Where the claim would be used.

fields.name: expected_output_hint
fields.description: Short expected output or boundary hint.

fields.name: rationale
fields.description: Why this route and decision are the gold expectation.

non_goals: automatic discovery of template ids from arbitrary prose
semantic validation of a newly filled adapter template without domain review
replacement of human novelty, correctness, or deployment-safety judgment
